Article: Rebuild of Evangelion Book Scans
[]: Rebuild of Evangelion Book Scans...             Quote Post by ShuyaAki » Mon Jun 27, 2011 11:17 pm I have looked all over the intranets to find ROE related book scans and to no end of fail... Is it just me I'm too newb to find the loops? Or is the scanning era ending... Anyways, there are few Book scans I've been wanting to get... So I was wondering if the people at EvaGeeks could help. If anyone could link me to any of these, I would be grateful Evangelion Anima Visual Book Rebuild of Evangelion 2.0 Complete Records (Groundworks) This might be against the forum rules... but hope someone can help out this time...
